title: Prosperity of the Early Le Dynasty
summary: Under the building hands of King Le Thai To and his successors, our country became wealthy and powerful with many brilliant achievements.

slides.text: After ascending the throne (as King Le Thai To), Le Loi immediately set to work helping the people recover their lives. Lush green rice fields reappeared everywhere.
slides.imagePrompt: Vast green rice fields, farmers smiling, irrigation canals with water flowing, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The Thang Long imperial citadel was renovated and became even more magnificent. The King held examinations to choose talented people to help the country, encouraging everyone to study.
slides.imagePrompt: The imperial palace in Thang Long with colorful flags, a busy school with students and teachers, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: To protect the country, the King also ordered the mapping of the territory and set fair laws so that everyone could live together in harmony.
slides.imagePrompt: An ancient map of Vietnam being unrolled on a large wooden table, officials examining it, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: During this period, our country was not only strong militarily but also brilliant in culture and education. This was one of the most developed stages in our national history.
slides.imagePrompt: A panoramic view of a prosperous Thang Long city under the sun, colorful buildings, busy streets, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Who was the first king of the Later Le Dynasty?
Which of the following activities was of special concern to the Early Le Dynasty?
options: Organizing examinations to choose talented people
slides.answer: Organizing examinations to choose talented people
